-{"id":"bd-1lwb","title":"Wide terminal (382+ cols) causes excessive whitespace in multiple scenes","description":"## Description
When running demo_showcase on a very wide terminal (382+ columns in user's case), multiple scenes have excessive whitespace and poor layout.

## Affected Scenes
1. Hero - content left-aligned with empty right side
2. Layout - columns have huge gaps
3. Composition cards - excessive spacing between panels

## Root Cause
Many renderables don't have max_width constraints, so they expand to fill the terminal width even when that produces ugly output.

## Expected Behavior
Scenes should have sensible max widths (e.g., 120-160 columns) and center content when terminal is wider.

## Files
- src/bin/demo_showcase/*.rs (all scenes)
- Potentially add a DemoConfig max_width setting","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-29T00:20:48.695066429Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T00:20:48.695066429Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"bd-1lwb","title":"Wide terminal (382+ cols) causes excessive whitespace in multiple scenes","description":"## Description
When running demo_showcase on a very wide terminal (382+ columns in user's case), multiple scenes have excessive whitespace and poor layout.

## Affected Scenes
1. Hero - content left-aligned with empty right side
2. Layout - columns have huge gaps
3. Composition cards - excessive spacing between panels

## Root Cause
Many renderables don't have max_width constraints, so they expand to fill the terminal width even when that produces ugly output.

## Expected Behavior
Scenes should have sensible max widths (e.g., 120-160 columns) and center content when terminal is wider.

## Files
- src/bin/demo_showcase/*.rs (all scenes)
- Potentially add a DemoConfig max_width setting","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-29T00:20:48.695066429Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T00:23:19.475756335Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-1mam","title":"BUG: Panel titles/subtitles show raw markup instead of styled text","description":"## Problem Statement

Panel titles and subtitles in demo_showcase panels_scene render markup as literal text instead of styled output.

## Specific Evidence

```
╭────────── [bold cyan]Styled Title[/] ──────────╮   ← Should be cyan+bold
╰─────────────── [dim]Right-aligned subtitle[/] ─╯   ← Should be dimmed

╭────────── [green]Status[/] ──────────╮             ← Should be green
│  [bold green]Deployment successful[/]│             ← Should be bold+green

┏━━━━━━ [bold yellow]Warning[/] ━━━━━━━┓             ← Should be bold+yellow
┃  [yellow]Memory usage is at 85%[/]   ┃             ← Should be yellow
```

## Blocked By

- **bd-3sxn**: Root cause fix for markup parsing consistency

## Implementation (after bd-3sxn is complete)

Update panels_scene.rs to use new markup-aware Panel API:

```rust
// BEFORE (broken):
Panel::from_text(content).title("[bold cyan]Styled Title[/]")

// AFTER (fixed):
Panel::from_text(content).title_markup("[bold cyan]Styled Title[/]")
// OR if Panel auto-parses:
Panel::from_text(content).title(Text::from_markup("[bold cyan]Styled Title[/]"))
```

## Testing Requirements

### Unit Test (in panels_scene or panel.rs tests)

```rust
#[test]
fn test_panels_scene_no_raw_markup() {
    init_test_logging();
    let console = test_console();
    console.begin_capture();
    
    // Run the panels scene
    run_panels_scene(&console);
    
    let output = console.export_text();
    
    // Check for common markup patterns that should NOT appear
    let forbidden = ["[bold", "[dim]", "[green]", "[yellow]", "[cyan]", "[italic]"];
    for pattern in forbidden {
        assert\!(\!output.contains(pattern), 
            "Raw markup {} found in panels scene output", pattern);
    }
}
```

### Visual Verification Script

```bash
# tests/scripts/verify_panels_scene.sh
cargo run --bin demo_showcase --features showcase -- --scene panels --no-interactive 2>&1 | \
  grep -E '\[bold|\[dim|\[green|\[yellow' && \
  echo 'FAIL: Raw markup found' && exit 1 || \
  echo 'PASS: No raw markup'
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All Panel titles in panels_scene render with styles
- [ ] All Panel subtitles render with styles
- [ ] Panel body content with markup renders correctly
- [ ] No literal `[tag]` patterns in scene output
- [ ] Unit test verifies no raw markup
- [ ] Visual verification script passes","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-28T22:45:38.650074132Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T22:58:35.621405930Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T22:51:47.661525607Z","close_reason":"Fixed: Added title_from_markup() and subtitle_from_markup() methods to Panel that parse Rich markup. Added 3 unit tests. Existing behavior preserved for title()/subtitle().","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo-showcase","rendering"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1mam","depends_on_id":"bd-3sxn","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T22:58:35.621362629Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

Time-based validation.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:55:07.622886177Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T20:38:11.630877116Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T20:38:11.630813488Z","close_reason":"progress*.rs has 41 tests covering: static progress display, animated updates, speed calculations, ETA display, multiple bars, custom styles, and completion states.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1mre","depends_on_id":"bd-20dk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:58:58.356656274Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1mre","depends_on_id":"bd-vh8c","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:55:07.626300172Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

Small, reusable building blocks for the demo binary:
- `badge(text, style_name)` -> `Text` (or markup snippet)
- `kv_row(key, value)` -> renderable suitable for panels
- `section_title("...")` -> rule + aligned title

These keep the demo consistent and prevent copy/paste styling drift.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:40:19Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-2hz8","title":"Panels scene 'Tip' panel renders without visible borders","description":"## Description
In the panels scene, the 'Tip' panel using MINIMAL box style renders without any visible borders.

## Actual Behavior
```
              [bold blue]Tip[/]
  Use --quick for faster iteration
  Use --seed 42 for reproducible output
```

No border characters visible at all.

## Expected Behavior
Should show some border indicator even if minimal:
```
              │ Tip │
  ────────────────────────
  Use --quick for faster iteration
  Use --seed 42 for reproducible output
  ────────────────────────
```

## Root Cause
The MINIMAL box style may have empty/whitespace characters for borders, making it invisible.

## Files
- src/bin/demo_showcase/panel_scene.rs:188-198
- src/box.rs (MINIMAL definition)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-29T00:19:10.661750886Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T00:19:10.661750886Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

 {"id":"bd-2j06","title":"demo_showcase: SVG export writer","description":"Implement SVG export writing and print the output path.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:44:58.528362072Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T03:43:09.505403661Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T03:43:09.505339923Z","close_reason":"SVG export already implemented: Console::export_svg(true) called in run_export_with_console(), path printed to stderr, foreignObject note in export_scene.rs, modern browser compatibility documented.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","export","svg"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2j06","depends_on_id":"bd-164e","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:44:58.544199353Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2j06","depends_on_id":"bd-86gp","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:54:46.372982102Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":52,"issue_id":"bd-2j06","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## SVG export

Use `Console::export_svg(true)` (or configured variant) and write to `demo_showcase.svg`.

## Acceptance criteria

- SVG contains representative multi-style output (not just text).
- Demo prints a short note that SVG uses `<foreignObject>` and is best viewed in modern browsers.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:45:23Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2jec","title":"Conformance: enable fixture-based parity for Syntax/Markdown/JSON","description":"Strengthen Python Rich parity by expanding conformance fixtures beyond plain-text comparisons.

Scope:
- Update Python fixture generator + schema as needed so syntax/markdown/json have stable expectations.
- Normalize unstable fields (theme names, random ids, whitespace) where needed.

Acceptance:
- At least one new fixture each for Syntax/Markdown/JSON where compare_ansi=true (or clearly documented why not).
- Rust conformance test passes under: cargo test --test conformance_python --features "conformance_test,syntax,markdown,json".","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T21:35:16.789265580Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:13:10.121693324Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T22:13:10.121625438Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2jec","depends_on_id":"bd-3c90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T21:35:16.808226745Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
